geographic_restrictions: None specified; available in the UK and internationally (as per 'International' category).
project_area: Early Years Foundation Stage (EYFS), Key Stage 1 & 2, Special Educational Needs and Disabilities (SEND) provision, and nursery management.
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; open to educators, parents, carers, and settings supporting children in EYFS, KS1, KS2, and SEND.
eligibility_summary: Open to nurseries, childminders, schools, SEND providers, parents, and carers. The platform supports EYFS, KS1, KS2, and SEND settings, with tools for observation, planning, parent engagement, and nursery management.
